name_cn:
❤️Mist Grey
The latest Lady micro series, a bag that can't hold anything, only holds a cute little bag 😘, crafted from soft lambskin, featuring the iconic letter hardware buckle, exquisite bag shape 👏🏻, simple, stylish and versatile, small capacity, can only hold lipstick and car keys, also works as a card holder 🤗
size:12*10*5cm
6601
